name: Herbed Corn on the Cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a large pot of boiling water, cook the corn for 5 minutes until tender.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
3. In a microwave, cook on high until the butter is melted (1 - 1 1/2 minutes).
4. Serve the corn brushed with herb butter.
